arts.ttl: Referee appointed for Watford's FA Cup tie at Fulham
arts.sum: Matt Donohue has been appointed as the referee for Watford's FA Cup third round trip to Fulham tomorrow night.

arts.ttl: Fulham Interested in Juventus midfielder Douglas Luiz
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz's future at Juventus has become a subject of intense speculation as the January transfer window heats up. The Brazilian midfielder, who joined the Italian giants last summer, has struggled to make a significant impact in Serie A. Despite his difficulties, Luiz remains determined to prove himself in Turin, with the upcoming Turin derby against Torino potentially offering him a chance to stake his claim for a starting position. The post Fulham Interested in Juventus midfielder Douglas Luiz appeared first on FootItalia.com.
